session_notes.note: My 7 year old asked me why I always smell like smoke and it broke my heart. I want to quit for my kids
My 7 year old asked me why I always smell like smoke and it broke my heart. I want to quit for my kids
around a pack
Morning coffee is the worst, I always light up. And after the kids go to bed at night, that's my 'me time' and I always smoke then
can try delaying it. But the evening one feels harder, that's when I decompress after a long day with the kids
I only smoke maybe 3-4 cigarettes a day, usually with friends. I don't really think I'm a smoker, just someone who smokes occasionally
I mean sometimes when I'm bored maybe. But honestly I came here because my doctor flagged it on a routine checkup, not because I think I have a problem
I quit for 8 months last year but started again after a rough breakup. I know my triggers, I just need help building a proper plan this time
Emotional pain mostly. I needed something to cope with the loneliness and stress. Cigarettes were an old comfort I went back to
I'd have to actually deal with my emotions instead of numbing them. It's scary but I know it's better long term. Last time I used exercise and it helped a lot
I'd probably spiral like last time. One cigarette becomes a pack. I need a strategy for when that urge hits hard, especially during emotional moments
i have been consuming tobacco for 5 years abd my family dont like it. so i want to quit
i usually smoke right after i wake up.like 30 min after i break up
yes i tried walking but did not help much
it didnt help to reduce my cravings.
i dont know , my morning cravings arre worse like i said. just after 20-30 min after i wak up i smoke
I've tried quitting 3 times. Cold turkey didn't work, patches helped a little but I stopped using them too soon. I smoke about 20 cigarettes a day and the physical cravings are the worst part
stopped because I thought I was doing fine after 2 weeks, but the cravings came back hard. I'd try them again but I don't know how long I should actually use them
Stress at work mostly. But I really want to know — how long should I actually use the patches this time?
i smoke around 10 cigarettees a day and i want to quit
my family dont like me smoking
only family
well i smoke immediatly after i wake up . 30 min after i wake up
